sections.title: Dynamic mobile-forward homepage
sections.summary: Design first — custom, mobile-forward surfaces that feel like the brand, not a template.

features.title: Brand-first homepage
features.body: A dynamic, mobile-forward homepage built around the brand — interactive presence, not a brochure. Drop your recording as homepage.gif.

sections.title: PWA — alerts & home screen
sections.summary: iOS-style push banners, permission alerts, and home-screen badges. Installable Progressive Web App.

features.title: Alerts on a real device
features.body: Push notices and install flow on the home screen — the visual pattern of a real phone app. Record as pwa.gif.

actions.text: PWA alerts — phone on the desk

sections.title: Scheduling
sections.summary: Once the look lands — live booking and the rest of the OS start interacting.

features.title: Book a time
features.body: Prospects pick a real slot. Record the booking flow as scheduling.gif.

sections.title: Voice & call routing
sections.summary: Vapi on the homepage plus Telnyx call routing — answer, qualify, hand off, or book.

features.title: Voice in the wild
features.body: Tap-to-talk and call routing as someone would actually use it. Record as voice.gif.

sections.title: Clients
sections.summary: CRM-light contact records, portals, and CardDAV sync.

features.title: Client roster
features.body: Contacts and portals on the desktop OS. Record as clients.gif.

sections.title: Inbox
sections.summary: Unified email with rules, triage, and project threading.

features.title: Inbox & rules
features.body: Triage and reply in the admin inbox. Record as inbox.gif.

sections.title: Work
sections.summary: Jobs, checklists, comments — shared with the client portal when useful.

features.title: Jobs & checklists
features.body: Delivery tracked as work jobs. Record as work.gif.

sections.title: Documents
sections.summary: Templates and signing flows for proposals, contracts, and handoffs.

features.title: Sign & send
features.body: Generate, send, sign. Record as documents.gif.

sections.title: Knowledge
sections.summary: Team knowledge the agent and humans can both use.

features.title: Knowledge base
features.body: SOPs and reference for humans and agents. Record as knowledge.gif.

sections.title: Monitoring
sections.summary: Uptime, site change detection, and audit tooling.

features.title: Uptime & changes
features.body: Watch client sites for downtime and changes. Record as monitoring.gif.

sections.title: Billing
sections.summary: Invoicing via Crater — visible on the client portal when enabled.

features.title: Invoices
features.body: Send invoices and surface status on the portal. Record as billing.gif.
